events.title: Las Ninas Muertas
events.description: Tucked away in the Sierra Foothills of Northern California, a band of renegade women honor the music of the Grateful Dead all the way to its roots. Las Ninas Muertas is a five-piece, mostly acoustic unit playing a wide range of material from the Dead catalog as well as some of their well-loved covers. Ingrained with a passion for this timeless songbook, Las Ninas Muertas sing in that high-lonesome, four-part harmony style. Searing harmonica slices through the mix along with electric guitar riffs
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Magnificent Sanctuary Band
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS If you’re a true disciple of the music of Jerry Garcia, then you’ll know that there are few deeper cuts than “Magnificent Sanctuary Band.” This bonus track on Cats Down Under the Stars is extremely obscure, yet if you’re lucky enough to hear it, you’ll find yourself instantly wrapped in the familiarity of its bubbly warmth and honeysuckle groove. In this sense, it’s the most appropriate name for a band like the one playing on this night at the Crazy Horse Saloon. Once their soun
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Trivia Night
events.description: Nevada City’s longest running Trivia Night happens on *most* Wednesdays at the Crazy Horse. Great minds unite to Eat! Drink! Think! Bring your most clever friends, establish a team of up to five people and catalyze the collective power of your brilliant intellect. Your charismatic host BK will present questions covering a wide range of subjects in eight different categories. You’ll tap into knowledge you didn’t even realize you had. It’s challenging, it’s fun and it’s a refreshing change from th
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: SOUL Brass Band w/ DJ Fossil
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Soul Brass Band is the genre-bending creation of New Orleans percussionist and frontman Derrick “Smoker” Freeman, joined by an all-star cast of New Orleans heavyweights. Their sound is a fearless fusion of hip hop, jazz, second line tradition, classic soul, and street-born swagger — modern, infectious, and undeniably alive. Featuring Grammy-winning tubist Miles Lyons, Billboard-charting saxophonist James Martin, and a rotating lineup of elite New Orleans talent, Soul Brass Band
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: The Geezer Gig
events.description: Over fifteen years running and still going strong, this “Second Friday Tradition” is as reliable as the tides. You definitely don’t have to be a geezer to appreciate this community pow wow. Bob Woods is the most eminently tasteful guitarist in the foothills. The lifelong railroad man is too good to be this humble, while firmly planted behind the wheel of the locomotive. Doubling as a member of ZZ Top, drummer Skip Alan Smith relishes his role in powering the steam engine of the groove. Retro-coo
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: El Duo
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Born in 2015, Oakland’s “El Duo” blends lo-fi electronics and afro dance grooves with a natural sense of wonder. Drawing from their deep love of improvisation, Randy Schwartz (Brett Dennen, Illumination) & Harrison Murphy (Sun Hop Fat, Harry & the Hitmen) curate unique and inspired soundscapes for audiences. El Duo weaves together its unabashed brand of experimental dance music with an odd array of drums, percussion, synthesizers and effects. The witty pair approaches their conc
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Collectivity
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Collectivity doesn’t play groove music so much as activate it. Their live sets unfold like a conversation between muscle memory and curiosity – deep rhythmic foundations opening into psychedelic detours, then snapping back into focus with precision and intent. Its music built for movement, but powered by listening. Formed in Shanghai and now operating out of the Bay Area, Collectivity emerged from a desire to work off the grid – outside rigid genre lines and predictable structur
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Band Beyond Description50 Year Anniversary of 1976!
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS News Flash: BBD will be sticking with the earlier start time of 8:30pm until football season starts back up in September. If the Grateful Dead is your religion, then the Crazy Horse is your church when Third Thursday rolls around. Every month Jonny Mojo (Achilles Wheel), Gary Campus (Deadbeats) and Tim High (Tim High & the Mighty) host a cast of the finest musicians from around the region to conjure lightning in a bottle. BBD is a gathering point for everyone who wants to plug i
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: LAZWELL
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Lantz Lazwell is a larger-than-life figure. He’s part guitar hero, part comic book character, part international man of mystery. When fronting his band, LAZWELL, you’ll never find him deeper in his element. Audiences have no choice but to throw caution to the wind as LAZWELL leads the way through a multi-layered, poly-textural labyrinth of funky, bluesy, rock ‘n soul. Captivating jamming is only part of the equation for LAZWELL. The stylishly-attired frontman commands the stage
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States
